ModMetaData.name: Outerm English Translation
ModMetaData.author: Codex
ModMetaData.description:
English translation for [Aya]Outerm Race.
The translations are done by AI (gpt-5.4). Translates the Outerm race, faction, incidents, apparel, weapons, research, hediffs, backstories, and other in-game text to English.
Also patches the one hardcoded Japanese weapon growth message in the DLL so it displays in English.
